productDisplayName: Puma Men EI Vuelo Mid Leather Brown Shoes
description: German brand puma is known for its high-end athletic footwear with simple, stylish designs. This pair of El Vuelo mid-top shoes from Puma comes witheh a comfortable footbed and classic stitch detailing coupled with a leather upper. Upper Mid-top styling on textured leather with synthetic overlays Central lace ups Padded tongue and heel collar Stitch detail along the seams of the toe box Velcro strap at the back of the ankle for a snug Fit Zipper for ease of wearing at the heel collar, under the Velcro strap Midsole Soft, cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Puma cat logo on the PU midsole for style Outsole TPU outsole with terraced lugs and branding for grip and traction shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
